steps.title: Multiply both sides by 23u
steps.content:
Start with $n = \frac{p}{23u}$. To isolate $p$, multiply both sides by $23u$:
$$n \cdot 23u = \frac{p}{23u} \cdot 23u$$

steps.title: Simplify to solve for p
steps.content: The $23u$ on the right cancels the denominator, leaving $p = 23un$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A. $p = n - 23u$ — subtraction does not undo division; incorrect.
  • B. $p = n + 23u$ — addition does not undo division; incorrect.
  • C. $p = \frac{n}{23u}$ — this would result from dividing, not multiplying; incorrect.
  • D. $p = 23un$ — matches our derivation.
That matches Choice D — $p=23un$.
